one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: one GBE completed accounting for three years of previously unreported operations (FY2021-FY2023), reducing investment in GBEs and income from GBEs
economic_notes: Nation has investments in forestry (T'Se'Kame' Forestry Ltd. and LP), fisheries (Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group GP Ltd. and LP), and tourism/development (Echo Bay Development Ltd.). Work in progress includes six new houses ($2,090,903) and a Hybrid Solar Plant ($2,640,795). BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP interest held as portfolio investment.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three grounds: (1) inability to verify deferred revenue classification ($2,984,235); (2) GBE financial statements not fully audited; (3) no approved budget prepared for FY2024. Prior year figures restated due to GBE catching up three years of unreported operations. Segment salaries ($647,575) differ slightly from expenses-by-object salaries ($659,835) — likely allocation difference. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,895,963 + Government of Canada $61,920 + Province of BC $2,684,583 + FNHA $638,669 = $5,281,135; however deferred revenue note shows CMHC funding received ($32,800) not yet recognized, and Gaming LP revenue ($657,206) treated as portfolio investment income not government transfer — total_government_transfers set to $5,281,135 plus Gaming LP $657,206 and FNHA as health authority = $7,278,135 including FNHA and Gaming LP as transfer-like sources. OSR = $9,488,762 - $7,278,135 = $2,210,627 (rental, interest, other revenue, Interfor). Annual debt service reflects only repayments per cash flow statement ($43,418); new CMHC loan of $712,175 was proceeds. Six new houses under construction included in WIP.
